creator: boris@brooknet.com.au
text:
Martin Kammerhofer wrote:
> Hello Sam!
>
> The latest ac-archive distribution (from Dec. 2005) is broken as provided
> by the upstream source (i.e. ac-archive.sourceforge.net).
> I am investigating wether it's better to switch to 
> autoconf-archive.cryp.to
> which seems to be an independently maintained alternative source.
> I'll report about my findings next week.
>
> HTH,
>   Martin
>

Thanks!
